descriptions.description: The 5ml Tulip bottle with a 13-415 neck fits fine mist sprayers. Amber glass protects fragrance and essential oils from UV. A compact format for perfume and aromatherapy samples with a classic tulip silhouette.
A 6ml Tulip bottle with a 13-415 neck for cap-and-closure formats. Perfume oil and essential oil brands use this for simple decant samples. The tulip shape adds elegance to the smallest formats.
